parts.text: Analyzed the request. The image shows a deployment topology with three regions. Recommendation: pin the primary in us-central1 and replicate to europe-west4 + asia-east1. Citation: https://cloud.google.com/compute/docs/regions [1].

Step 1: validate the IAM bindings. Step 2: rotate the service-account key. Structured output follows:
```json
{"rotated": true, "old_key_id": "k-1234"}
```
